study_or_category: ML-only concrete strength prediction (e.g. Yeh 1998; HPC reviews 2025-2026)
main_focus: Maximise predictive accuracy for compressive strength
limitation: Output is an isolated number; not element-bound or interoperable
how_proposed_work_differs: We embed prediction as one field of an auditable element-level record with decision logic and OpenBIM/IDS mapping
We persist explanation into the passport and tie it to a QA decision and evidence level
We treat durability as an optional provenance-flagged block; do not overclaim a solution

study_or_category: BIM-based QA/QC / construction quality management (QualiSite 2025; ASCE 2025)
main_focus: Link inspections/quality documents to BIM elements
how_proposed_work_differs: We add ML prediction + uncertainty + carbon + evidence to the element record

study_or_category: Construction-phase digital twin for concrete quality (arXiv 2026 preprint; Sci Rep 2025)
main_focus: Element-level QA readiness via sensing + prediction
limitation: Not expressed in OpenBIM IFC/IDS; not vendor-neutral/checkable
how_proposed_work_differs: We express the record through IFC + a proposed Pset + an IDS requirement matrix

main_focus: Carbon accounting; match BIM elements to LCA/EPD
limitation: Carbon only; EPD weakly represented in IFC
how_proposed_work_differs: We use carbon as one block fused with quality/QA in a single decision record

study_or_category: Material Passport / Digital Product Passport (PRISMA review 2026; concrete DPP 2025)
how_proposed_work_differs: We target construction/in-service quality-durability-sustainability decision support

limitation: Generic mechanism or carbon-only; awaits domain content
how_proposed_work_differs: We define a concrete-performance requirement set spanning quality+durability+carbon+QA

main_focus: Operationalise predictions into auditable element-level decision records
data_type: Public tabular data + EPD benchmark; OpenBIM/IDS schema
limitation: Demonstration on public/illustrative data; conceptual IFC/IDS; approximate uncertainty
how_proposed_work_differs: Integrates all dimensions into a reproducible data-management methodology mapped to OpenBIM/IDS
